operatorSummary: The board reads constructive risk-on, with 4 buy setups and 2 risk-reduction names. Current evaluation history shows 100.0% 1D hit rate, so the edge looks real but still young.

newsItems.title: Micron, Sandisk, Marvell stocks jump, leading chip sector gains
newsItems.summary: Micron and other chip-related stocks rose on Thursday as the AI trade reignited.

newsItems.title: Why Is AMD (AMD) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
newsItems.summary: Shares of computer processor maker AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) jumped 5.8% in the afternoon session after a Morgan Stanley supply chain report highlighted surging demand for its next-generation chips, sparking multiple bullish analyst calls.

newsItems.title: Update: US Equities Rise, Oil Prices Fall as Traders Look Past Middle East Tensions
newsItems.summary: (Updates with market moves at the end of the day.) Wall Street's equity benchmarks rose Thursday

newsItems.title: Why Meta’s In-House AI Chip Plans Sent Chip-Equipment Stocks Soaring
newsItems.summary: Meta’s decision to make its in-house chip could be a boon for Applied Materials, Lam Research, and KLA, which all make equipment that turns raw silicon wafers into microchips.

newsItems.title: Teradyne Stock Rides on Strong Datacenter Growth: More Upside Ahead?
newsItems.summary: TER's AI-driven data center demand, record revenue surge and test-solution launches signal momentum as competition heats up.

newsItems.title: AI could cause a huge electricity shortfall in the US, Bank of America says: A closer look
newsItems.summary: Bank of America (BAC) predicts that the US could face a major electricity shortage between 2026 and 2030. Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley breaks down the details.

newsItems.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow End Higher Led By Chipmaker Stocks As Investors Look Past US-Iran Hostility — ORCL, SBUX, WULF, PANW, FATE In Focus
newsItems.summary: The United States carried out a second consecutive day of new military operations against Iran.

newsItems.title: Symbotic (SYM) Stock Still Looks Cheap Following Its 315% Run
newsItems.summary: Symbotic stock has pulled back sharply this year even after delivering very large 5 year gains, and current checks suggest the market price sits well below an intrinsic value estimate and the broader multiples signal.
